author: Frosty40
name: Podracing II: Electric Bugaloo — Multi-Order Backoff + Entropy-Adaptive Alpha
blurb: 11L/512d U-Net with legal score-first 7-gram backoff (orders 2-7) + entropy-adaptive alpha. 3-seed mean val_bpb=0.9625. N-gram concept credited to @deanbrr (PR #659), backoff+adaptive inspired by @Asukabot0 (PR #727).
